ben.note: Perfect crunch-to-weight ratio, herby enough to feel fancy.

janna.note: Could eat a whole packet before the col, no regrets.

ben.note: Decent fig paste but the pastry gets soggy in a jersey pocket.

janna.note: Classic, reliable, and somehow always the right call at 1500 m.

ben.note: Sugar hits fast, a handful on the descent is basically medical.

janna.note: Gets welded together in summer heat — peel apart and eat anyway.

ben.note: Dry and crumbly, fine but not exciting.

janna.note: More of an emergency snack than a treat.
